title: For Kawasaki 11013-7044 & 11013-7045 Inner & Outer Air Filter Cleaners Combo for Donaldson Kohler 25-083-01-S P821575 & P822858
features: ✅Compatible With Kawasaki Models: FX651V, FX691V, FX730V, FX751V, FX801V, FX850V, FX1000V tractor. ✅FD731V, FD750D, FD791D, FH770D, FH601D, FH641D, FH680D, FH721D lawn mower. ✅FH601V, FH641V, FH601D, FH680V, FH721V, FH601V-FH721V, FH770D, for 25 HP engines.
✅Metal mesh protect filter, ensure that it is more secure and used long time. High humidity, preventing the filter element from sucking and causing the filter element to be broken down.
✅Compatible with numerous brands. Please check OEM Part Numbers for reference
description: Welcome to DefLife ： We provide 100% perfect customer service, please contact us if you have ANY questions ! ▲Fitment: ✔Outer Filter Replaces OEM Part Numbers: ✔11013-7020, 11013-7044, 25 083 01, 25 083 01-S, K7561-82860, R1411-42270, TA040-93230, TC620-93230, 4235, 841237, 841497, M131802, M144100, M164264, M170281, MIU12457, PMAF25551, RG60690, 4114746, 4164630, 6672467, 1213661, 1467472 ✔Inner Filter Replaces OEM Part Numbers ✔11013-7019, 11013-7045, 25 083 04, 25 083 04-S, K7561-82820, R1411-42280, TA040-93220, 4236, 821136, 841238, 4423981, M131803, M144098, MIU12458, PMAF25552, RG25644, RG60866, 4114747, 4167145, 6669548, 6672468, 1467473, 1710493 ▲Package includes: 1 x Air filter as pictured ▲NOTE: Please make sure the part numbers match the part you are replacing. Please check our photos and make sure the part shown looks identical to your stock one.
